svg.title: BuddyOS Bootloader Flow
svg.desc: Flowchart of the BuddyOS bootloader showing the sequence from power-on through disk loading, A20 enable, GDT setup, protected mode switch, and kernel execution, with error branches.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the BuddyOS bootloader do during initialization? Explain cli, xor ax, mov ds/es/ss, sp, sti.')
sendPrompt('Explain the CPU init in BuddyOS: cli, xor ax ax, setting ds/es/ss to 0, and sp to 0x7C00, then sti.')
sendPrompt('How does print_string work in the BuddyOS bootloader? Explain BIOS int 0x10 teletype output.')
sendPrompt('Explain the disk read in BuddyOS: BIOS int 0x13 ah=0x02, reading sector 2 from drive 0x80 to address 0x1000.')
sendPrompt('What happens when the disk read fails in BuddyOS? What does jc disk_error do?')
sendPrompt('What message does BuddyOS print after the kernel is successfully loaded?')
sendPrompt('What is the A20 line and why does BuddyOS need to enable it? Explain BIOS int 0x15 ax=0x2401.')
sendPrompt('What happens if A20 line enable fails in BuddyOS?')
sendPrompt('Explain the GDT in BuddyOS: the null descriptor, code segment descriptor (0x9A), and data segment descriptor (0x92), and what lgdt does.')
sendPrompt('How does BuddyOS switch to 32-bit protected mode? Explain setting CR0 bit 0 and the far jump to 0x08:protected_mode.')
sendPrompt('What happens in protected_mode in BuddyOS? Explain setting ds/es/fs/gs/ss to 0x10 and esp to 0x9C000.')
sendPrompt('How does BuddyOS jump to the kernel? Why does it call 0x1000, and what does that address mean?')
sendPrompt('What does BuddyOS do if the kernel returns? Why does it cli then hlt?')
